template.name: Course Explanation — Clear Classroom Bundle
template.description: Polished 8-scene explainer bundle: sky gradients, navy editorial panels, definition quote, process timeline, example grid, stat proof, and recap outro — ideal for teaching one topic clearly.

scenes.title: Lesson Cover
scenes.description: Elegant lesson opener with sky gradient, hero visual, and instructor card.

clips.content: Lesson 01 · Clear explanation in under 2 minutes
A focused explainer that breaks one topic into simple ideas — what it is, how it works, and what to remember. Replace with your lesson hook.

scenes.title: What You'll Learn
scenes.description: Instructor panel left, four learning objectives right with check icons.

clips.content: By the end of this lesson you will understand the core idea, follow the process step by step, and apply it with confidence.

Understand the core idea in plain language
See real-world examples you can relate to
Remember the key takeaway and apply it

scenes.title: The Core Idea
scenes.description: Navy copy panel with overlapping concept diagram image.

clips.content: Every complex topic can be explained in plain language. Start with the big picture, then zoom into the details that matter most for your learners.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap sky presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Key Definition
scenes.description: Circular visual with elegant quote card for a memorable principle.

clips.content: "Learning is the process of acquiring knowledge or skills through study, experience, or teaching — made clear one idea at a time."

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap sky presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: How It Works
scenes.description: Four equal step cards with icons, numbers, and descriptions.

clips.content: Follow this four-step flow to explain any concept clearly — from input to real-world application.
Introduce the topic and why it matters to your learners.
Split the idea into clear, manageable parts.
Show examples and walk through each step aloud.
Invite learners to use the idea in a real scenario.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap sky presets, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Types & Examples
scenes.description: Three example cards with photo thumbnails and accent bars.

clips.content: Three ways this idea shows up in practice. Swap images and labels for your subject matter.
See how the concept appears in everyday work situations.
A typical scenario where learners apply this idea successfully.
A deeper example for learners ready to go further.

scenes.title: By the Numbers
scenes.description: Three impact metrics with elevated stat cards.

clips.content: Numbers help learners grasp impact quickly. Replace with metrics that matter for your topic.
Learners grasp basics quicker with visual explainers.

scenes.title: Recap & Next Step
scenes.description: Navy closing with takeaways, CTA card, and resource links.

clips.content: • Remember the core idea in one sentence
• Follow the four-step process when explaining
• Apply the concept with a real example today
You now have the essentials. Review the key points, try the next lesson, or download the companion resources.
Move to the next lesson or download the companion worksheet.
